title: The Dark Dweller
description: The Dark Dweller is a mangled version of the cave dweller. It will hunt you what ever chance it gets.
body:
The Dark Dweller is a mangled version of the cave dweller. It will hunt you what ever chance it gets.

![Dark Dweller](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e5b2997630b53a49e3909265dd867c9066dc8f48.png)

(ALL THE IMAGES BESIDES THE MOD ICON ARE OF THE OLD MODEL!)

Not currently compatible with the Cave Dweller, Cave Dweller Evolved or the Reimagined Cave Dweller.

 

If you want to use it with the Reimagined Cave Dweller then use this version:

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/compatible-reimagined-cave-dweller

 

Requires GeckoLib:

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/geckolib
